src/main/java/ru/nokkov/blps_lab/BlpsLab.general_idea: Extend SpringBootServletInitializer to allow the Spring Boot application to be deployed as a WAR file to an external servlet container like JBoss.
src/main/java/ru/nokkov/blps_lab/BlpsLab.human_impl: public class BlpsLabApplication extends SpringBootServletInitializer { ... protected SpringApplicationBuilder configure(SpringApplicationBuilder application) { return application.sources(BlpsLabApplication.class); } }

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Revert Spring Boot parent version from 3.3.0 to 3.2.4, likely for stability or compatibility reasons during migration.
Switch project packaging from default jar to war to support deployment to an external application server like WildFly.
Exclude the embedded Tomcat starter to prevent conflicts when deploying the WAR to an external servlet container.
Exclude various logging frameworks (Logback, Log4j, SLF4J bridges) to rely on the application server's logging or a specific configuration.
Add the Spring Boot validation starter to enable Bean Validation support.
Add Lombok as a provided dependency to reduce boilerplate code in entities and services.
Add Spring Security starter to implement authentication and authorization features.
Add Spring Security test dependency to facilitate testing of secured endpoints.
Add Jakarta Servlet API as a provided dependency to ensure compatibility with the external servlet container.
Add the WildFly Maven plugin to automate deployment of the WAR file to a local WildFly instance.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Configure the application to listen on a specific port.
Configure the primary datasource for the article database.
Configure the secondary datasource for the partner database.
Enable automatic SQL initialization on startup.
Enable SQL logging and formatting for debugging purposes.
Configure Hibernate to create and drop schema on startup.
Configure Hibernate naming strategies for camelCase to underscores conversion.
